# Project context

We are building an internal tool that helps Bentley account executives prepare pre-meeting briefs on enterprise customers in under 5 minutes.

# Repository structure

- strategy/ frames the problem, market, value, roadmap
- src/ contains the application code
- docs/ captures architecture and limitations
- pitch/ contains narrative, demo script, anticipated questions

# Mandatory context loading

Before any task, read the current state of:
1. strategy/PROBLEM.md
2. strategy/VALUE.md
3. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
4. pitch/NARRATIVE.md

# Bentley visual identity

- Primary blue: #004B87
- Navy: #002855
- Typography: system-ui, Segoe UI, sans-serif
- Generous whitespace, card-based layouts, rounded corners 6-8px

# Writing conventions

- Short declarative sentences
- No jargon unless technically required
- Every strategic document fits on one page
